summary: TrimSpace defensively around all four ST_* env reads (ST_CLIENT_ID, ST_CLIENT_SECRET, ST_APP_KEY, ST_TENANT_ID).
reason: Trailing newlines from PowerShell/.env sourcing produced opaque invalid_client 400s from the ServiceTitan OAuth endpoint. Whitespace-stripping the values at the env-read boundary is the only place this can be fixed without leaking the credential bytes to logs (see JKA env gotcha in user memory).
validated_outcome: auth login succeeds with credentials that have trailing whitespace
